name: Amparo Fondita

notes: Every one of the six frozen rows was reconciled against the current restaurant-issued on-page tasting image and all 91 presentations in the current exact-address restaurant-linked Toast catalog.
Three frozen formulations remain current; Aguachile de Naranja, Palmiitos con Chayote, and Halibut en Mole Coloradito belong only to the older contradictory PDF and were removed as stale.

The corrected catalog contains 88 current formulations across 97 published presentations and 13 categories. It restores 85 current formulations omitted by the frozen six-row record and keeps Bebidas, Sake, and Cocktails last.
Four exact duplicate Toast presentations, two obvious Toast naming aliases, and three cross-surface tasting/Toast overlaps were consolidated without dropping any source presentation.
Three Toast description-only blocks lacked item names; they were preserved as source anomalies and not invented as products.
Neither the old PDF nor the current tasting image is an allergen menu. The frozen official-allergen-menu classification was false even where its positive allergen set happened to be correct.

Six current on-page tasting formulations have restaurant-issued positive ingredient or unambiguous formulation signals and are labeled official-ingredients; 82 formulations remain officially unavailable.
Current linked Toast descriptions are retained only as restaurant-linked-vendor evidence and separately labeled Ingredient Intelligence, never promoted to restaurant-issued allergen claims.

No current complete allergen matrix, item-level may-contain disclosure, shared-equipment statement, or negative safety assurance was found. The page's dietary-restrictions/server-alert language is not converted into cross-contact data.

The frozen extraction followed a still-linked but visually stale PDF, ignored the contradictory current on-page tasting image, omitted the current restaurant-linked operational catalog, and mislabeled dish descriptions as an official allergen menu.

The repair parses every current Toast item presentation, stock state, category, vendor ID, available description, price, and configuration marker from a hash-pinned mirror of the browser-readable direct page, then merges the reviewed current tasting image by canonical formulation.

Ingredient Intelligence was reviewed item by item. Narrow overrides remove Niman Ranch dressing and oat-milk dairy false positives, preserve explicit egg/cheese cues, keep probable panko at medium confidence, and translate unambiguous Spanish fish/shellfish names without changing official authority.

Fourteen focused tests pass; the target-only repair is idempotent at SHA-256 0214853ff1149136feb0d34b0b8348b99de6d0dfebe79e88cc7a96c6ac4b8036 and preserves all 1,494 non-target restaurants at SHA-256 f12c8817660fe743c787c67e2f6a7c6090e0473cb9b93221f733062abad2765e.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured the current identity page and current menu navigation, confirming 2002 P St NW, phone 202-621-8166, and the restaurant-linked Toast ordering destination.
Captured and visually reviewed the current on-page winter tasting image and the page's linked one-page PDF; the documents publish different six-course menus.
notes: The current on-page image is used for current formulations. The older PDF is retained as stale source-history evidence.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Browser review and a hash-pinned transport mirror exposed 91 current exact-address item presentations across Dinner, Amparo's Masa, and Bar; direct ledger and curl retrieval returned HTTP 403.
notes: The direct browser-readable page remains restaurant-linked-vendor authority; the mirror is third-party transport evidence only.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Browser-readable exact-address Uber Eats page corroborated the active Toast categories and core current formulations; direct ledger retrieval returned HTTP 403.
notes: Used as corroboration only, never official allergen evidence.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured and visually reviewed six sample menu images from a publicly accessible but currently unlinked page; the image set conflicts with the current operational catalog and on-page tasting image.
notes: Retained as source history, not used to expand the current catalog or make current allergen claims.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Reviewed the current official pages, current image menus, linked ordering catalog, targeted web results, and corroborating exact-address vendor page; no current restaurant-issued allergen matrix or item-level cross-contact disclosure was found.
notes: Server-alert and dietary-restriction language is not a may-contain statement.

findings.summary: The frozen six-row app catalog came from an older tasting PDF that the current page still links even though its on-page tasting image now publishes a different menu.
findings.resolution: Quarantined the contradictory PDF as stale history, removed its three obsolete-only dishes, and used the current on-page image plus current linked operational catalog.

findings.summary: The frozen record contained six tasting courses and omitted 85 formulations from the current 88-formulation catalog.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt 88 formulations from all 97 current source presentations across 13 categories, restoring every omitted formulation and preserving presentation provenance.

findings.summary: All six frozen rows were labeled official-allergen-menu even though the cited source only published dish descriptions and no allergen matrix.
findings.resolution: Removed the false matrix classification, limited official-ingredients to six current positive formulations, left 82 rows officially unavailable, and invented no negative or cross-contact claims.

findings.summary: The official domain exposes a current on-page tasting image, an older linked PDF, and a separate unlinked six-image sample menu that conflict with one another and the current operational catalog.
findings.resolution: Applied freshness and navigability boundaries: current linked Toast plus the current on-page tasting image define the working catalog; contradictory unlinked/old documents remain source history only.

findings.summary: The generic frozen path selected the stale PDF, omitted the linked Toast catalog and new tasting image, and promoted ingredient descriptions to official allergen-menu status.
findings.resolution: Added a guarded reviewed parser/manifest that parses all Toast presentations, merges the current image fixture, enforces source authority, consolidates variants, and passes focused verification.

findings.summary: Generic Ingredient Intelligence treated Niman Ranch as ranch dressing, oat milk as dairy, and explicit egg batter as necessarily wheat while missing several unambiguous Spanish seafood and quesillo cues.
findings.resolution: Added narrow reviewed inference corrections without promoting any linked-vendor clue to official authority.

findings.summary: The frozen generated record omitted Amparo Fondita's current street address.
findings.resolution: Set the display address to 2002 P St NW, Washington, DC 20036.

repairs.summary: Quarantined the contradictory old PDF; removed three stale rows; restored 85 omitted formulations; produced an 88-formulation, 97-presentation current catalog with beverages last; corrected all six frozen source semantics; limited official positive signals to six current on-page courses; kept 82 rows officially unavailable; and corrected narrow Ingredient Intelligence edge cases.

notes: Current address: 2002 P St NW, Washington, DC 20036.
